channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
item.description: Android 17 is getting a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that will put a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half of your screen to theoretically make it easier to play games. With foldable gaming mode, which is set to launch in the coming months, the virtual controller emulates physical button presses at a system […]

item.title: 99 Prime Day Deals That Aren’t For Suckers, Up to 50% Off (2026)
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: Venezuela’s Powerful Earthquakes Were a Rare ‘Seismic Doublet’
item.description: The country was hit hard by a pair of quakes that happened in quick succession and were likely driven by stress being transferred from one part of the fault that runs through the country to another.

item.title: I switched to Logitech’s ergonomic keyboard and mouse to minimize wrist strain, and I won’t ever go back to conventional desk accessories
item.description: Wrist pain while working? Logitech’s ergonomic keyboard and mouse helped alleviate my suffering — and both products are on sale now.

item.title: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
item.description: YouTube is adding even more TikTok-like features to Shorts, including a new "clear screen" mode that removes the icons and text from the video you're watching. In a blog post on Thursday, YouTube says it's also replacing the "thumbs-up" button with a "heart" icon, and is introducing a new option that lets you watch Shorts […]

item.title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
item.description: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

item.title: Quote of the day by former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer: 'There's no chance that the iPhone is going to get any significant market share' — a staggering misread of the future of consumer devices
item.description: The iPhone has become one of the most successful consumer and business devices in history, defying initial doom and gloom

item.title: The most popular Grok feature is, apparently, exactly what you think
item.description: NSFW uses account for "well over half" of traffic, a new report says.

item.title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
item.description: The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. The Information reported that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees Wednesday in a company Q&A that it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form - granting access only to a small group of […]...

item.title: Forget the Apple Watch Ultra 3, you probably don't need it — this Prime Day Apple Watch Series 11 deal represents better value overall
item.description: This Prime Day Apple Watch Series 11 deal actually represents better value than the Ultra 3 — you're far less likely to be paying for features you won't use

item.title: Prime Day ends soon: We found the 150+ best deals on Apple, Kindle, DJI, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is still going. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Commodore has dropped the price of its retro phone by $100 ahead of preorders
item.description: A refreshing direction for a price change.

item.title: Framework has good news and bad news
item.description: Thanks to the component crisis, it's a bad time to want a new computer. But if you are waiting on a preorder for the Framework Laptop 13 Pro - which Framework's CEO has called the "MacBook Pro for Linux users" - the company shared good news on Thursday that might mean yours will cost less […]

item.title: 25 Prime Day deals under $25 — I’m a tech reviewer, and I’ve picked the best cheap deals on smart bulbs, phone chargers, wireless earbuds, and more
item.description: I can't believe how good some of these deals are — grab amazing tech deals, all with all products available for under $25.

item.title: Mashable at VidCon sweepstakes 2026 entry rules
item.description: Full terms and rules for the Mashable at VidCon 2026 sweepstakes.

item.title: The best Walmart Summer Deals to shop during Prime Day
item.description: Walmart Summer Deals have now kicked off and run until June 28. Save on Apple, gaming, TVs, and more.

item.title: California launches a statewide tracker to monitor AI-related job loss
item.description: The tracker and its accompanying report found no evidence of a statewide surge in layoffs among those working in highly AI-exposed jobs. California governor Gavin Newsom just announced a statewide tracker that follows AI-related unemployment claims—and said it’s the first tool of its kind in the country.

item.title: How to watch Tunisia vs. Netherlands online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Tunisia vs. Netherlands in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Japan vs. Sweden online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Japan vs. Sweden in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the latest Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on Samsung TVs, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.
